raw_consumer_statement:
I have a charge account with Citibank. My card was fraudulently charged four times through XXXX ( I DO NOT HAVE XXXX AND NEVER ORDERED THROUGH THEM OR AUTHORIZED ANY ONE TO DO SO ). All these items were charged during the period XXXX XXXX XXXX  Finding out I reported as a dispute the four charges, CANCELED my card, and was issued a new card. 
Today I received a second letter from Citibank holding me responsible. Among other things it cites, I did not provide the information requested. NO PLACE, TIME, OR BY ANY METHOD WAS I ASKED FOR MORE INFORMATION. 
I dispute was found in my favor and like ALL the others was in the same timeframe and same method through a XXXX account. That one transactions shows as : XXXX * XXXX XXXX XXXX CA XX/XX/year> Amount {$81.00} I was found responsible for : XXXX. XXXX * XXXX XXXX CA XX/XX/year> Amount {$310.00} ; XXXX. XXXX * XXXX XXXX CA XX/XX/year> Amount {$900.00} ; XXXX. XXXX * XXXX XXXX CA XX/XX/year> Amount {$370.00} ; and XXXX. Citibank XX/XX/year> ADVANCES TRANSACTION FEE {$80.00}.
